pilot_readiness_verdict: not pilot-ready; staged real benchmark dataset missing

evidence_tier_summary.staged_real_home: Primary pilot gate. This suite alone can justify outreach readiness.
evidence_tier_summary.synthetic_home: Secondary coverage suite. Use for scenario expansion and regression detection, not pilot authority.
evidence_tier_summary.public_surveillance: Secondary stress suite. Use for anomaly/crime robustness only, not home-security truth claims.
evidence_tier_summary.smoke_pipeline: Smoke suite. Use for pipeline sanity and contract checks only.

gate_failures: staged_real_home dataset missing: no primary pilot-gate cases
